banner.title: Gemini Omni Free Access
banner.description: Learn how to try Gemini Omni-style AI video generation for free on GeminiOmni, what free credits are best for, and where practical limits start when you move from experiments to production.

features.title: What Free Access Is Good For

details.title: Validate the Workflow Before Paying
details.description: Free access is best for learning how prompts behave, testing image references, and deciding whether GeminiOmni fits your creative style. Use it to test the interface, generation speed, prompt structure, and download flow before you buy more credits.

cells.content: See whether your idea can become a usable video draft
Check whether a product, person, or style reference improves control
Confirm history, playback, and download behavior before scaling

details.title: Free Does Not Mean Unlimited
details.description: AI video generation is compute-heavy, so free access usually comes with credit, speed, model, or usage limits. Treat free credits as a way to evaluate fit, not as a permanent replacement for a production plan.

cells.content: Free credits can run out after a small number of generations or retries
Some premium workflows may require paid credits
Campaign batches, client work, and repeated variants usually need paid capacity

details.title: Get More from Each Free Generation
details.description: The best way to stretch free credits is to write complete prompts and avoid vague trial-and-error. Include subject, environment, motion, camera, style, duration, and anything that must not change.

cells.content: Slow dolly-in, close-up, overhead, handheld, or wide establishing shot
Subject walks forward, product rotates, clouds move, fabric flutters
Documentary, cinematic ad, product demo, anime, 3D render, editorial

usageGuide.title: How to Try GeminiOmni for Free
usageGuide.description: Use free access to answer one question: can this workflow produce the kind of video you need?

steps.title: Sign in and check credits
steps.description: Create an account and confirm your available credits before generation.

steps.title: Run a focused test
steps.description: Use one strong prompt or one clean reference image instead of many vague attempts.

steps.title: Review output and decide
steps.description: If the result is close, iterate or move to a paid credit path for larger batches.

models.name: Image to Video
models.description: Animate a reference image into a video.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Gemini Omni Free Access Questions
faq.description: Answers about starting without paying first.

items.title: Can I use GeminiOmni for free?
items.description: Yes. GeminiOmni provides a free starting path with credits so you can try AI video generation before choosing a paid plan.

items.title: Do free credits last forever?
items.description: Free credits are intended for evaluation. For repeated generation, larger batches, or production work, use paid credits or a subscription.

items.title: What should I test first?
items.description: Start with one concrete prompt or one reference image that represents your real use case. This gives a more useful signal than random demos.

items.title: Is free GeminiOmni access the same as a free Google API?
items.description: No. GeminiOmni free access is product-level access. Official Google API access and pricing are separate.

cta.title: Use Your First Free Credits on a Real Idea
cta.description: A focused prompt teaches you more than a generic demo.
